_comment: v3.2 state file for the engineering-digest skill. Populated 2026-05-19 from a back-scan of issues 7-10 in issues/. Fields inferred from HTML (last_lead_topic, outside_in_history, last_leadership_read) are derived from the most recent lead h2, .outside-in-section anchor, and Leadership Read source URL respectively. Fields that cannot be derived from the published HTML alone (last_editorial_moment, last_lead_opener, last_qt_layout, last_oi_format, in_practice_history, last_feature_date, last_stack_date, last_rabbit_hole_date) are initialised to null/empty — the spec's rotation rules will simply have no recent constraint to enforce on the first new run, then populate normally from then on. The previous digest-state.json is preserved at the repo root as a legacy archive.

outside_in_history.source: Ramp's Inspect agent writes half of merged PRs
